mapper.sql: select stk.id, stk.qty, stk.material_id, stk.material_name as snap_material_name, stk.material_speci as snap_material_speci, stk.material_model as snap_material_model, stk.material_factory_id as snap_material_factory_id, stk.warehouse_id, stk.unit_price,stk.amt, stk.batch_no, stk.batch_id, stk.batch_number, stk.material_no, stk.material_date, stk.warehouse_date, stk.supplier_id,stk.factory_id,stk.begin_time,stk.end_time,stk.receipt_order_no,stk.kc_no,stk.tenant_id,stk.settlement_type, stk.main_barcode, stk.sub_barcode, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, m.id mId,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName, m.speci m_speci, m.model m_model, m.register_no m_registerNo, m.unit_id m_unitId, m.factory_id m_factoryId, m.supplier_id m_supplierId, m.is_billing m_isBilling, m.period_date m_periodDate, m.package_speci m_packageSpeci, m.is_way m_isWay, u.unit_id u_id, u.unit_code u_code, u.unit_name u_name, f.factory_id f_id, f.factory_code f_code, f.factory_name f_name, ms.id ms_id, ms.code ms_code, ms.name ms_name, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, wc.warehouse_category_id wc_id, wc.warehouse_category_name wc_name, fc.finance_category_id fc_id, fc.finance_category_name fc_name, rk.create_time rk_create_time, rk.audit_date rk_audit_date, cu.nick_name rk_creater_nick, au.nick_name rk_audit_nick from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = COALESCE(stk.factory_id, m.factory_id) left join fd_supplier ms on m.supplier_id = ms.id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id left join stk_io_bill rk on rk.bill_no = stk.receipt_order_no and rk.bill_type = 101 and (rk.del_flag = 0 or rk.del_flag is null) and rk.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id left join sys_user cu on rk.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on rk.audit_by = au.user_id
and (m.id is null or ((m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1) and (m.is_use is null or m.is_use = '' or m.is_use != '2')))

select SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty,0)) totalQty,SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty,0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price,0)) totalAmt from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id
select stk.id,stk.material_id, m.id mId,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id
mapper.select: select stk.id, stk.qty, stk.material_id, stk.material_name as snap_material_name, stk.material_speci as snap_material_speci, stk.material_model as snap_material_model, stk.material_factory_id as snap_material_factory_id, stk.warehouse_id, COALESCE(stk.unit_price, (select COALESCE(entry.unit_price, entry.price) from stk_io_bill_entry entry inner join stk_io_bill bill on bill.id = entry.paren_id where bill.bill_no = stk.receipt_order_no and bill.bill_type = 101 and entry.material_id = stk.material_id and entry.batch_no = stk.batch_no and entry.del_flag != 1 limit 1 ), CASE WHEN stk.amt IS NOT NULL AND stk.qty IS NOT NULL AND stk.qty > 0 THEN stk.amt / stk.qty ELSE NULL END ) as unit_price, stk.amt, stk.batch_no, stk.batch_id, stk.batch_number, stk.material_no, stk.material_date, stk.warehouse_date, stk.supplier_id,stk.begin_time,stk.end_time,stk.receipt_order_no,stk.kc_no, stk.del_flag, stk.delete_by, stk.delete_time, stk.tenant_id, stk.settlement_type, stk.main_barcode, stk.sub_barcode, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, m.id mId,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName, m.speci m_speci, m.model m_model, m.register_no m_registerNo, m.unit_id m_unitId, m.factory_id m_factoryId, m.supplier_id m_supplierId, u.unit_id u_id, u.unit_code u_code, u.unit_name u_name, f.factory_id f_id, f.factory_code f_code, f.factory_name f_name, ms.id ms_id, ms.code ms_code, ms.name ms_name, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id inner join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier ms on m.supplier_id = ms.id where m.del_flag != 1 and m.is_gz != 1 and stk.qty > 0 and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (m.is_use is null or m.is_use = '' or m.is_use != '2') and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} order by stk.material_id, stk.batch_no, stk.id
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_inventory
qty, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, warehouse_id, unit_price, amt, batch_no, batch_id, material_no, material_date, warehouse_date, supplier_id, factory_id, begin_time, end_time, receipt_order_no, kc_no, batch_number, tenant_id, settlement_type, main_barcode, sub_barcode,
#{qty}, #{materialId}, #{snapMaterialName}, #{snapMaterialSpeci}, #{snapMaterialModel}, #{snapMaterialFactoryId}, #{warehouseId}, #{unitPrice}, #{amt}, #{batchNo}, #{batchId}, #{materialNo}, #{materialDate}, #{warehouseDate}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{receiptOrderNo}, #{kcNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{tenantId}, #{settlementType}, #{mainBarcode}, #{subBarcode},
mapper.delete: update stk_inventory set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update stk_inventory set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from stk_inventory where batch_no = #{batchNo} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by id desc limit 1
select stk.id from stk_inventory stk where stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and 1=0

select stk.material_id materialId, stk.warehouse_id warehouseId, w.code warehouseCode, w.name warehouseName, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, MAX(f.factory_name) factoryName, wc.warehouse_category_name warehouseCategoryName, fc.finance_category_name financeCategoryName, m.package_speci packageSpeci, m.register_no registerNo, m.is_way isWay, SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) availableQty, CASE WHEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))) / SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) ELSE NULL END unitPrice, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))), 2) materialAmt from stk_inventory stk inner join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id where stk.qty > 0 and (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (w.warehouse_type is null or w.warehouse_type not in ('高值', '设备'))
and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseName}, '%') and stk.material_id = #{materialId}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%'))
and m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') and m.model like concat('%', #{materialModel}, '%')
and find_in_set(concat(stk.material_id, '__', stk.warehouse_id), #{excludeMaterialWarehousePairs}) = 0
GROUP BY stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id, w.code, w.name, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, m.package_speci, m.register_no, m.is_way, wc.warehouse_category_name, fc.finance_category_name order by w.code, m.code
